description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Project Foundation product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Project Definition).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Project Foundation.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of Oracle Project Foundation accessible data as well as  unauthorized read access to a subset of Oracle Project Foundation accessible data and unauthorized ability to cause a partial denial of service (partial DOS) of Oracle Project Foundation. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 6.3 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L).
